statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | grep -o '"display_name":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*":"//;s/"//'); used=$(echo "$input" | grep -o '"used_percentage":[0-9.]*' | head -1 | sed 's/.*://'); if [ -n "$used" ]; then printf '%s | %.0f%%' "$model" "$used"; else echo "$model"; fi
